para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: ASB-1226 / Q.No.13 / PRASH-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
As per Section 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, the following Ministries have been notified:
An officer of the Secretary cadre is being transferred inter-departmentally for administrative reasons.
The posting is being done in the section shown in column-4 in front of his name: -
2. Shri Nitin Jyotinath Ghiratkar, Under Secretary should join the Tribal Development Department immediately.
3. Shri Nitin Jyotinath Ghiratkar, Under Secretary, Department of Public Health dated 09.01.2026
Since he has been unilaterally relieved of his duties from (M.No), Mr. Ghiratkar's date is 10.01.2026 (M.No). (a) It is
The period up to the date of the order is as per the provisions of the M.N.S. (General Conditions of Service) Rules, 1981.
Compulsory waiting periods are being regulated under 9 (14) (f) (two).
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
